form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 2080m at Cranbourne, at the bell was 4th-6.2 beaten 11 m by Platinum Jive (2:30.90) in NR 56 to 64 on April 3 at $7.50. form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr5) over 2080m at Cranbourne, at the bell was 5th-8.4 beaten 9 m by Platinum Jive (2:30.90) in NR 56 to 64 on April 3 at $41. Forward performance expected.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh after being driven well back, behind Le Betty at Riverina Paceway over 2270m in a NR up to 58 on March 20 at $17. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind Cardigan Dan at this track over 2240m in a NR 58 to 66 on April 4 at $41. Can improve. Can feature from a favourable draw.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 1.75 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at Kilmore (2:05.80) beating My Ultimate Luigi in NR 50 to 53 on March 26 at $34 at the bell was 3rd-3.63. Two runs back 3rd (Fr4) over 2100m after showing early pace at Geelong, at the bell was leading 2.15 beaten 7 m by Lord Verde (2:36.00) in NR 48 to 52 on March 13 at $23. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr6) over 2240m after racing wide at this track, beaten 18 m by Cardigan Dan (2:47.50) in NR 58 to 66 on April 4 at $34. Expecting a better run this time.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Sr1) over 2200m after racing wide at Ballarat, beaten 20 m by Heatseeker (2:42.40) in NR 58 to 67 on March 19 at $3.30. Showed ability the outing before when he won by a head as favourite (Fr4) at Kilmore (2:39.20) beating Martyr in NR 57 to 64 on February 26 at $1.60 at the bell was 4th-7.53. With even luck he can make an impact.
